en: And after six days Jesus took with him Peter and James, and John his brother, and led them up a high mountain by themselves.
zh: 過了六天，耶穌帶著彼得、雅各和雅各的弟弟約翰，領他們悄悄地上了高山。

en: And he was transfigured before them, and his face shone like the sun, and his clothes became white as light.
zh: 耶穌在他們面前改變了形象，臉好像太陽一樣照耀，衣服潔白像光。

en: And behold, there appeared to them Moses and Elijah, talking with him.
zh: 忽然，摩西和以利亞向他們顯現，跟耶穌談話。

en: And Peter said to Jesus, "Lord, it is good that we are here. If you wish, I will make three tents here, one for you and one for Moses and one for Elijah."
zh: 彼得對耶穌說：“主啊，我們在這裡真好。如果你願意，我就在這裡搭三個帳棚，一個為你，一個為摩西，一個為以利亞。”

en: He was still speaking when, behold, a bright cloud overshadowed them, and a voice from the cloud said, "This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased; listen to him."
zh: 彼得還說話的時候，有一朵明亮的雲彩籠罩他們，雲中有聲音說：“這是我的愛子，我所喜悅的，你們要聽他。”

en: When the disciples heard this, they fell on their faces and were terrified.
zh: 門徒聽見了，就俯伏在地上，非常害怕。

en: But Jesus came and touched them, saying, "Rise, and have no fear."
zh: 耶穌前來，摸著他們說：“起來，不用怕。”

en: And when they lifted up their eyes, they saw no one but Jesus only.
zh: 他們抬起頭來，看見只有耶穌自己，沒有別的人。

en: And as they were coming down the mountain, Jesus commanded them, "Tell no one the vision, until the Son of Man is raised from the dead."
zh: 他們下山的時候，耶穌吩咐他們：“人子從死人中復活以前，你們不要把所看見的異象告訴人。”

en: And the disciples asked him, "Then why do the scribes say that first Elijah must come?"
zh: 門徒就問他：“那麼經學家為甚麼說，以利亞必須先來呢？”

en: He answered, "Elijah does come, and he will restore all things.
zh: 他回答：“以利亞當然要來，並且復興一切。

en: But I tell you that Elijah has already come, and they did not recognize him, but did to him whatever they pleased. So also the Son of Man will certainly suffer at their hands."
zh: 但我告訴你們，以利亞已經來了，可是人們卻不認識他，反而任意待他。照樣，人子也要這樣被他們苦待。”

en: Then the disciples understood that he was speaking to them of John the Baptist.
zh: 這時門徒才領悟，耶穌是指著施洗的約翰說的。

en: And when they came to the crowd, a man came up to him and, kneeling before him,
zh: 耶穌和門徒來到群眾那裡，有一個人前來，跪下對耶穌說：

en: said, "Lord, have mercy on my son, for he is an epileptic and he suffers terribly. For often he falls into the fire, and often into the water.
zh: “主啊，可憐我的兒子吧，他患了癲癇病，非常痛苦，好幾次掉進火裡和水中。

en: And I brought him to your disciples, and they could not heal him."
zh: 我帶他去見你的門徒，他們卻不能醫好他。”

en: And Jesus answered, "O faithless and twisted generation, how long am I to be with you? How long am I to bear with you? Bring him here to me."
zh: 耶穌說：“唉！這又不信又乖謬的世代啊！我要跟你們在一起到幾時呢？我要忍受你們到幾時呢？把孩子帶到我這裡來吧。”

en: And Jesus rebuked him, and the demon came out of him, and the boy was healed instantly.
zh: 耶穌斥責那鬼，鬼就從孩子身上出來；從那時起，孩子就好了。

en: Then the disciples came to Jesus privately and said, "Why could we not cast it out?"
zh: 門徒悄悄地前來問耶穌：“為甚麼我們不能把鬼趕出去呢？”

en: He said to them, "Because of your little faith. For truly, I say to you, if you have faith like a grain of mustard seed, you will say to this mountain, 'Move from here to there,' and it will move, and nothing will be impossible for you."
zh: 他說：“因為你們的信心太小了。我實在告訴你們，只要你們的信心像一粒芥菜種，就是對這山說：‘從這裡移到那裡’，它也必移開。沒有甚麼是你們不能作的。”

en: As they were gathering in Galilee, Jesus said to them, "The Son of Man is about to be delivered into the hands of men,
zh: 他們聚集在加利利的時候，耶穌對門徒說：“人子將要被交在人的手裡，

en: and they will kill him, and he will be raised on the third day." And they were greatly distressed.
zh: 他們要殺害他，第三天他要復活。”他們就很憂愁。

en: When they came to Capernaum, the collectors of the half-shekel tax went up to Peter and said, "Does your teacher not pay the tax?"
zh: 他們來到迦百農，收殿稅的人前來對彼得說：“你們的老師不納稅嗎？”

en: He said, "Yes." And when he came into the house, Jesus spoke to him first, saying, "What do you think, Simon? From whom do kings of the earth take toll or tax? From their sons or from others?"
zh: 他說：“納。”他進到屋子裡，耶穌先問他：“西門，你認為怎樣？地上的君王向誰徵收關稅和丁稅？向自己的兒子還是外人呢？”

en: And when he said, "From others," Jesus said to him, "Then the sons are free.
zh: 他回答：“外人。”耶穌對他說：“這樣，兒子就可以免稅了。

en: However, not to give offense to them, go to the sea and cast a hook and take the first fish that comes up, and when you open its mouth you will find a shekel. Take that and give it to them for me and for yourself."
zh: 但為了避免觸犯他們，你要到海邊去釣魚；把第一條釣上來的魚拿起來，打開魚的嘴，你就會找到一個大銀幣。你可以拿去交給他們作你我的殿稅。”
